name: Cabbage with Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Strip the cabbage from the ribs and wash thoroughly. Cover with salted water and boil for 10 minutes. Drain the water and let cool slightly. Chop the cabbage finely.
2. Heat Crisco and sauté the chopped onion until golden brown.
3. Add the chopped cabbage, broth cube, and water to a pot. Bring to a simmer and cook for 1 1/2 hours, adding more water if needed to prevent drying out.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Add the sausage slices on top and cover. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Serve cabbage in bowls, topped with sausage slices and home fries.
